hazards.failure_condition: A generated route is incomplete, stale, incompatible with procedures, or not permitted, but is treated as suitable for dispatch.
mitigations: Keep active mode locked to simulator.
Require licensed AIRAC, procedure, airway, RAD/ATC and route-availability validation before any operational release.
hazards.title: Wrong route released
verification: Operational readiness endpoint reports route/filer blockers until evidence is accepted.
Route validation tests reject invented identifiers and disconnected procedures.

hazards.failure_condition: Fuel totals or reserves are underestimated because simplified educational fuel is mistaken for approved dispatch fuel.
mitigations: Label every current fuel result as simplified and non-operational.
Require approved aircraft performance, fuel policy, benchmark reconciliation and independent validation.
hazards.title: Wrong fuel released
verification: Phase 18 benchmark suite must pass before approved mode can be considered.

hazards.failure_condition: Out-of-date navdata, weather, NOTAM, airport status or restriction data is used without blocking operational release.
mitigations: Keep public/demo data outside the operational approval path.
Add source, cycle, timestamp, license, quality, expiry and fallback gates for operational data.
hazards.title: Stale or unapproved data used
verification: Certified data supply-chain tests fail closed on stale or unlicensed operational inputs.

hazards.failure_condition: AI-generated explanation text is interpreted as dispatch authority or invents unsupported operational reasoning.
mitigations: Keep explanations advisory and grounded in deterministic facts.
Disallow AI text from authorizing, altering or filing a route.
hazards.title: AI explanation misuse
verification: Approved workflow must separate explanatory text from dispatcher authorization.

hazards.failure_condition: Generated ICAO FPL fields exceed aircraft equipment, operator approvals or filing gateway acceptance.
mitigations: Do not enable ICAO filing in the simulator track.
Model aircraft capability, operator approval and filing validation before any filing integration.
hazards.title: Filing capability exceeds approval
verification: Operational route and filing engine rejects unapproved aircraft capabilities and unavailable filing paths.

hazards.failure_condition: A route ignores NOTAM, RAD, ATC, airspace, airport-status or flow restrictions.
mitigations: Keep restriction domains outside the MVP operational claim.
Require restriction providers and fail-closed operational blocking rules.
hazards.title: Restriction data missing
verification: Phase 17 acceptance tests prove unavailable restrictions block operational filing.
